# Deploy Mautic + MySQL - Open-Source HubSpot Alternative on Railway

Mautic marketing automation with MySQL plus worker and cron services.

[![Deploy on Railway](https://railway.com/button.svg)](https://railway.com/deploy/mautic-mysql-worker-cron)

## About

Self-host Mautic, an open-source HubSpot alternative, with MySQL, a public web service, and dedicated worker/cron services.

- `mautic-web`: public Mautic UI service
- `mautic-worker`: queue worker service for background jobs
- `mautic-cron`: scheduler service for recurring Mautic tasks
- `mysql`: private MySQL database with persistent storage
- Generated database passwords and Mautic secrets
- Private networking between Mautic services and MySQL

## What gets deployed

| Service | Source | Type |
|---------|--------|------|
| mautic-cron | `mautic/mautic:5-apache` | Worker |
| mautic-worker | `mautic/mautic:5-apache` | Worker |
| mysql | `mysql:lts` | Database |
| mautic-web | `mautic/mautic:5-apache` | Web service |

## Environment variables

| Variable | Service | Default |
| --------- | ------- | ------- |
| `MAUTIC_DB_USER` | mautic-cron | (secret) |
| `MAUTIC_DB_PASSWORD` | mautic-cron | (secret) |
| `MAUTIC_DB_USER` | mautic-worker | (secret) |
| `MAUTIC_DB_PASSWORD` | mautic-worker | (secret) |
| `MYSQL_USER` | mysql | (secret) |
| `MYSQL_PASSWORD` | mysql | (secret) |
| `MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD` | mysql | (secret) |
| `MAUTIC_DB_USER` | mautic-web | (secret) |
| `MAUTIC_DB_PASSWORD` | mautic-web | (secret) |

## Configuration

- **Start command:** `/bin/bash -lc 'echo  | base64 -d >/tmp/railway-mautic-start.sh && chmod +x /tmp/railway-mautic-start.sh && exec /tmp/railway-mautic-start.sh'`
- **Start command:** `/bin/bash -lc 'echo  | base64 -d >/tmp/railway-mautic-start.sh && chmod +x /tmp/railway-mautic-start.sh && exec /tmp/railway-mautic-start.sh'`
- **Volume:** `/var/lib/mysql`
- **Start command:** `/bin/bash -lc 'echo  | base64 -d >/tmp/railway-mautic-start.sh && chmod +x /tmp/railway-mautic-start.sh && exec /tmp/railway-mautic-start.sh'`
- **Healthcheck:** `/health`
- **Networking:** Public domain with automatic HTTPS
- **Volume:** `/var/www/html/config`

**Category:** Automation

[View on Railway →](https://railway.com/deploy/mautic-mysql-worker-cron)
